prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约17770名、17717名、15775名、16481名、17970名。近五年位次波动较大，2023年曾升至最高点15775名，但2024年回落至16481名，2025年进一步后移至17970名，整体呈现震荡后移态势，2025年基准位次约17970名；该校在北京市招生计划2021年为6人，2022–2025年均为4人；2026年计划仍为4人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，招生规模极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年约第173–198名，属于中下游211院校，整体层次对高分考生吸引力一般；该校在声誉监测文件中未出现，声誉平稳无显著舆情事件；抖音热度排名第106，评价为"一般"，综合热度较低，短视频平台曝光量有限，未出现明显的报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中青海大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出，对考生的学科吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业包括临床医学、计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、机械设计制造及其自动化，其中临床医学（推荐/偏热）、计算机类（推荐/偏热）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）均为社会热度较高的专业方向，可能吸引部分考生关注；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年的65434人大幅增加约29.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力明显上升；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，距北京较远，属于典型的跨省偏远地区招生，地域偏好对北京考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在北京招生人数极少（仅4人），属于该校全国招生中的极小份额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17970名、2026年招生计划持平、北京考生规模大幅增加约29.7%导致竞争加剧、招生专业热度较高但学校层次一般且地处偏远等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约18170名，位次区间17670–18670名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 青海大学在北京市招生计划仅4人，专业选择空间极小。位次在预测区间17670–18670名内，建议以二档专业为主进行填报；位次明显优于区间下限（如17600名以内）可重点冲刺临床医学；位次接近区间上限（如18500名以外）则需谨慎考虑，该校整体录取风险较高。由于招生人数极少，位次波动可能较大，建议同时准备其他保底院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 17770, 17717, 15775, 16481, and 17970 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, peaking at 15775 in 2023, then dropping to 16481 in 2024, and further declining to 17970 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17970. The enrollment plan in Beijing was 6 students in 2021 and 4 students from 2022 to 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 4 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction. The enrollment scale is extremely small, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 173–198 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among mid-to-lower tier 211 institutions. Its overall level has average appeal to high-scoring students. The university does not appear in reputation monitoring documents, indicating stable reputation with no significant public opinion events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 106th, rated as 'average', with relatively low overall heat and limited exposure on short video platforms, showing no clear signs of increased application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no outstanding advantages, thus having relatively limited appeal to students in terms of disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation. Among these, Clinical Medicine (recommended/relatively popular), Computer Science (recommended/relatively popular), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended/popular) are all socially popular directions, potentially attracting some applicants. The total number of Beijing college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 84,900, a significant increase of approximately 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, leading to a substantial expansion of the candidate pool and increased competitive pressure. Qinghai University is located in Xining, Qinghai Province, far from Beijing, typical of cross-province remote area enrollment, with geographical preferences somewhat suppressing Beijing students' willingness to apply. The university enrolls very few students in Beijing (only 4), representing a minimal share of its national enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17970, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant 29.7% increase in Beijing candidates intensifying competition, the relatively high popularity of majors, but the average university level and remote location, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 18170, with a ranking range of 17670–18670.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Qinghai University's enrollment plan in Beijing is only 4 students, leaving extremely limited major selection. For rankings within the predicted range of 17670–18670, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors for application. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 17600), prioritize Clinical Medicine. If the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., beyond 18500), proceed with caution, as the overall admission risk is high. Due to the very small enrollment number, ranking fluctuations may be large, so it is advisable to prepare other safety schools simultaneously.
